The Planets Mars + Saturn + Moon is in one direction
amounting to'be in one sign. Since the significator of husband
Mars is combined with Saturn +Moon, her husband will be
wandering. Since Saturn is posited in his own house and Kuja
is also posited there itself (1 :Sf)) both husband and also son do
not have any happiness or at peace.
Significator of mother Moon though exalted in
Vrishabha is actually hemmed in between Ralru and Ketu, so she
will have least happiness.
Venus is the Yoga planet for this native. venus is posited
in Karkataka along with Ravi, Position ofRavi + Sukra in
Karkaataka and position of Budha in 2 to this combination is
considerd as Inauspicious or Evil combination. She will not have
happiness and does not listen to her husband. Since Moon is
posited in 9 to Mars, it is considered that the blemish of Mars
exists.
Male Horoscope 6704 :
Often break in service
